recent.task: Hardened James's inbox scope rule across 3 files — pulse-bootstrap.md, email-inbox-pulse SKILL.md, delegated-mailbox-access.md. Read-only: no send, no mark-read, no labels.
Pressure-tested persistent Chrome browser — restart resilience ✓, Google session persistence ✓, form interaction ✓. Created orgo-chrome skill with known limitations and workarounds.
Accepted Gmail delegation from james@notforgotten.com.au — verification propagating (up to 30min). Chrome persistent profile active on CDP :9222.
Inbox pulse cron upgraded to 24/7 coverage — closed the 8-hour blind spot that caused a delegation verification email to be silently missed today

Ingested and adapted 12 marketing skills from coreyhaines31/marketingskills for Not Forgotten: copywriting, emails, cro, marketing-psychology, cold-email, offers, copy-editing, pricing, popups, signup, churn-prevention, ad-creative. All tradie-adapted with NFS voice/product context.
Fixed inbox pulse double-post bug — mark-as-read now happens before summarising, closing race condition between Phase 1 (60s poll) and Phase 2 (slow agent boot)
Rebuilt inbox watchdog as two-phase pulse: 60s unread scan + full-identity agent boot when mail found, auto-mark-read
Full-graph wikilink pass + vault lint: 22 files connected (~70 links), 2 orphan cards fixed (git, supabase), 0 broken links
